title: Lines Have Their Linings, And Books Their Buckram.
content:
As in our clothes, so likewise he who looks,
    Shall find much farcing buckram in our books.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Lines Have Their Linings, And Books Their Buckram."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
